title: BetterCreeperDrops-DataPack
description: Make Creeper drop TNT and more!
body:
This DataPack/Mod has changed the loot table for the Creeper.

The changed loot table includes:
- Gunpowder: 0 ~ 5
- Bones: 0 ~ 3
- Random Record: 1
- TNT: 1 (0.3% chance)
- Flint: 1 (0.15% chance)
- Iron Ingot: 1 (0.15% chance)

You can add this DataPack/Mod to your modpacks.
